calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-26-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2004 Continued To Apr-26-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Susan Lew, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for and with Plaintiff James Pappas.
Defendant Jean Dawson present in pro per. Co-defendant, Sean Braimes, Ms. Dawson's son, is not present but sent written authorization for Ms. Dawson to negotiate on his behalf.
Parties reached a settlement whereby it is agreed that Judgment pursuant to Stipulation in open court be filed.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 502 Clement Street, Apt. 4, San Francisco. Writ of execution is stayed until MAY-01-2004. Defendants shall pay Plaintiff the sum of $1,900.00 for past due rent an per diem damages, payable on or before April 14, 2005. Defendants waives right to stay of eviction, to move for new trial or appeal of Judgment entered. Any personal property left remaining at the premises shall be deemed abandoned. Rental agreement is declared void and forfeited. Plaintiff shall retain security deposit. If Defendants complies with the terms of the settlement, Plaintiff shall vacate the judgment. The parties agree to mutual release from all claims.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court. Defendant agrees to submit the signature of co-defendant Sean Braimes by tomorrow, Friday, April 16, 2004 by 5:00pm to the office of Plaintiff's counsel in order to have the APR-19-2004 trial date vacated.
The Court deemed the matter settled, but the matter remains on the trial calendar until submission of Sean Braimes signature as noted above.
